channel.title: NPR Topics: News
channel.description: NPR news, audio, and podcasts. Coverage of breaking stories, national and world news, politics, business, science, technology, and extended coverage of major national and world events.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: Brash CNN founder Ted Turner dies
item.description: Turner had a larger-than-life personality, and used it to launch the country's first 24/7 all-news network.
item.content:encoded:
Turner had a larger-than-life personality, and used it to launch the country's first 24/7 all-news network.

(Image credit: Rick Diamond/Getty Images)
item.dc:creator: David Folkenflik

item.title: Have you lost or are worried about losing SNAP benefits? NPR wants to hear your story
item.description: NPR wants to hear from people impacted by changes to the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program.
item.content:encoded:
NPR wants to hear from people impacted by changes to the Supplemental Nutrition Assistance Program.

(Image credit: Joe Raedle)
item.dc:creator: NPR Staff

item.title: Iran says ships can pass Strait of Hormuz as Trump warns of bombings without a deal
item.description: Iran's Revolutionary Guard said shipping through the Strait of Hormuz could resume, under unspecified procedures, after President Trump paused a U.S. military effort to help vessels transit the strait.
item.content:encoded:
Iran's Revolutionary Guard said shipping through the Strait of Hormuz could resume, under unspecified procedures, after President Trump paused a U.S. military effort to help vessels transit the strait.

(Image credit: Amirhosein Khorgooi)
item.dc:creator: NPR's International Desk

item.title: Democrats gain midterm edge, NPR poll shows. And, U.S. pauses 'Project Freedom'
item.description: Democrats outpace Republicans in voter enthusiasm for the midterm elections, according to NPR's latest poll. And Trump says "Project Freedom" is paused because of progress toward an Iran agreement.
item.content:encoded:
Democrats outpace Republicans in voter enthusiasm for the midterm elections, according to NPR's latest poll. And Trump says "Project Freedom" is paused because of progress toward an Iran agreement.

(Image credit: Justin Sullivan)
item.dc:creator: Brittney Melton

item.title: A new Medicare option for weight loss drugs is coming: Here's what to know
item.description: Millions of people with Medicare will soon be eligible to get discounted GLP-1 drugs for weight loss. Here's how it will work.
item.content:encoded:
Millions of people with Medicare will soon be eligible to get discounted GLP-1 drugs for weight loss. Here's how it will work.

(Image credit: Universal Images Group)
item.dc:creator: Jackie Fortiér

item.title: Poll: Trump blamed for gas prices as Democrats gain midterm edge
item.description: A new NPR/PBS News/Marist poll finds strong support for Democrats this midterm season. It also shows increasing concern about the war in Iran and the economy, particularly the price of gas.
item.content:encoded:
A new NPR/PBS News/Marist poll finds strong support for Democrats this midterm season. It also shows increasing concern about the war in Iran and the economy, particularly the price of gas.

(Image credit: Spencer Platt)
item.dc:creator: Domenico Montanaro

item.title: Skeletons in their clothing: Recovering bodies from the rubble in Gaza
item.description: It was one of the deadliest Israeli strikes of the Gaza war, devastating one extended family. A year and a half later, the survivors find their loved ones' remains.
item.content:encoded:
It was one of the deadliest Israeli strikes of the Gaza war, devastating one extended family. A year and a half later, the survivors find their loved ones' remains.

(Image credit: Anas Baba)
item.dc:creator: Anas Baba

item.title: Lindsey Vonn's Olympic crash was a horrific setback. But she's never been one to hide
item.description: Vonn defied her doubters to race in the Olympics on a torn ACL, but her comeback dream ended with a broken left leg. Most people would want to hide after such a setback — but Vonn isn't most people.
item.content:encoded:
Vonn defied her doubters to race in the Olympics on a torn ACL, but her comeback dream ended with a broken left leg. Most people would want to hide after such a setback — but Vonn isn't most people.

(Image credit: Evan Agostini)
item.dc:creator: Becky Sullivan

item.title: A trip to Europe? In this economy? Expensive flights keep vacations closer to home
item.description: Travel advisers are seeing Americans picking cheaper domestic travel destinations over Europe.
item.content:encoded:
Travel advisers are seeing Americans picking cheaper domestic travel destinations over Europe.

(Image credit: Stephan Bisaha)
item.dc:creator: Stephan Bisaha

item.title: Do you say 'wash' or 'warsh?' Here's where the pronunciation comes from
item.description: Trump's nominee for the Federal Reserve chair, Kevin Warsh, has dominated headlines for weeks. For some, his surname is a reminder of a disappearing accent in South Midland America.
item.content:encoded:
Trump's nominee for the Federal Reserve chair, Kevin Warsh, has dominated headlines for weeks. For some, his surname is a reminder of a disappearing accent in South Midland America.

(Image credit: Fox Photos/Getty Images)
item.dc:creator: Ava Berger
